text: If we submit the bid on time, the client will review it.
We have won the contract, and now I will pitch the results.

I have led several deals this year.
We have closed a lot of contracts.
Our team has delivered plenty of results.
Have you ever pitched to many directors at once?
Natalie, you have two minutes. Give us your pitch, what is the takeaway this quarter?
This quarter we have closed a lot of deals. Our value proposition is faster, safer cloud services for the public sector.
Good. Highlight the impact for me. How many new clients have you signed?
We have signed several new clients and delivered plenty of value. The outcome is a three-year contract with the Ministry.
That is a compelling story. Have you tailored this pitch for the board next week?
Yes. I have tailored it for the board, with one clear takeaway: we have grown the public pipeline.
This quarter we have closed a lot of deals.
Our value proposition is faster, safer cloud services.
We have signed several new clients.
The takeaway is clear: our pipeline has grown.
I have tailored the pitch for the audience.

Hi Natalie, this is David Reed, VP of Sales. I am calling about the quarterly leadership review on Thursday. I would like you to present the public sector results. You will have two minutes, so keep it short and clear. Please open with your value proposition, then highlight the impact on the business with a few strong numbers. The directors want one clear takeaway, not a long report. You have done great work this quarter, so tell that story with confidence. Remember to tailor the pitch for the leadership team. Send me your one-pager before Thursday. Thank you, and talk soon.

Hi, this is Natalie, rehearsing my pitch for the leadership review. Here it is. Good morning, everyone. Our value proposition is simple: faster, safer cloud services for the public sector. This quarter we have closed a lot of deals and signed several new clients. We have delivered plenty of value, and our biggest project has reduced costs for the client. The outcome is a three-year contract with the Ministry. I have one clear takeaway for you today: our public sector pipeline has grown, and it has doubled this year. Thank you. I am happy to answer your questions.

First, you tailor the pitch for your audience. Then you open with your value proposition in one line. After that, you highlight the impact with a few strong numbers. Next, you share the outcome you have achieved. Finally, you end with one clear takeaway to persuade them.
